apihelp-titleblacklist-summary: Hubi sax ahaanshaha cinwaan bog, magaca faylka, ama magaca isticmaale adigoo isticmaalaya liiska cinwaannada la reebay.
apihelp-titleblacklist-param-nooverride: Ha isku dayin inaad ka gudubto liiska cinwaannada la reebay.
apihelp-titleblacklist-example-1: Hubi in [[Foo]] uu ku jiro liiska cinwaannada la reebay
apihelp-titleblacklist-example-2: Hubi in [[Bar]] uu ku jiro liiska cinwaannada la reebay ee wax ka beddelka
apihelp-createaccount-param-ignoretitleb: Iska indha tir hubinta been-abuurka (waxay u baahan tahay mid ka mid ah xuquuqaha soo socda: tboverride, tboverride-account).
